Cross-Dataset Generalization

Each round, the global model is evaluated on each client’s held-out test set. We report Accuracy, Balanced Accuracy (key for imbalance), and Macro-F1 (key for cross-domain fairness).

Convergence Curves (Ablation)

Privacy–Utility Trade-off

Differential privacy is approximated here by adding Gaussian noise (sigma) to local gradients. Higher sigma usually reduces utility (performance).

Variant dp_sigma Final_AvgAcc Final_AvgBAcc Final_AvgMacroF1
DP(sigma=0.05) 0.05 0.953056 0.790856 0.626628
DP(sigma=0.1) 0.10 0.961509 0.758748 0.632531

Adversarial Robustness

We evaluate FGSM attacks on each client’s test set and report the resulting metrics in the final table.
